headline: Is Kinder Morgan (KMI) Pricing Look Attractive After Strong Multi Year Share Gains?
summary: If you are wondering whether Kinder Morgan is offering fair value at around US$33.93, the best place to start is by looking at what the recent performance and news might be signaling about expectations baked into the price. Over shorter periods, the stock shows returns of 2.0% over 7 days, 3.7% over 30 days and 22.4% year to date, with 22.8% over the past year and a very large 3 year return that is around 7x. This provides important context before comparing price to fundamentals. Recent...
